I2900B Diabetic Retinopathy Code CHAR 1 The code for whether the patient had an active diagnosis of diabetic retinopathy.
276 BB0700_EXPRSN_IDEA_WNT_IND BB0700_EXPRSN_IDEA_WNT_IND BB0700 Expression Idea Want Code: Admission - The data in this column identifies the patient's ability to express ideas and wants at the time of admission.
